channel.title: cosmosdb on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in cosmosdb on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Now Generally Available – Partial Document Update in Azure Cosmos DB
item.description: Originally posted on https://devblogs.microsoft.com/cosmosdb/partial-document-update-ga/ We’re excited to announce the general availability of partial document update for the Azure Cosmos DB Core (SQL) API, which was announced at Microsoft Ignite!

item.title: Enhance local development experience using the Azure Cosmos DB Linux emulator and VS Code
item.description: This blog post provides a quick overview and demo of how you can use the Azure Cosmos DB Linux Emulator on Docker (in preview at the time of writing) along with Visual Studio Code in order to enhance your local development experience.
